rationale: Purely descriptive Manila celebrity activation write-up with no independent evaluative verdict.
T1 trade press reports Kering revenue down 6.2% and Gucci down 14.3% in Q1, clear negative momentum press.
Corrected coverage of Q1 2026 actuals: group revenue stabilizing but only via jewelry offsetting continued Gucci drag, with APAC down ~4% comparable; no Barclays Q2 forecast supports the item.
Corrected T1 report of actual Shanghai outlet closures plus analyst commentary on Asian consumer pullback; narrower and less dramatic than the original unsupported claim.
SNS post simply marks a regional activation with no independent evaluative content.
Fan-driven TikTok discover-tag content around staged Singapore activations, celebratory rather than critical, per activation/fandom discount.
Consumer reviews describe stitching failures, tarnishing hardware and unhelpful repair policy; genuine QC complaint but not SEA-specific, capping magnitude.
Descriptive profile of Thai ambassador's brand portfolio including Gucci, no independent evaluative verdict on the brand itself.
